#8412 we bundled fp16 headers for CUDA 12.x minor releases, in order to address several JIT compilation issues. However, it sorta breaks the current deployment story (that a full CTK installation is not strictly required). For example on the main branch:
```python
>>> import cupy as cp
>>> 2 * cp.empty(10)
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/local/home/leof/dev/cupy_cuda125/cupy/cuda/compiler.py", line 679, in compile
    nvrtc.compileProgram(self.ptr, options)
  File "cupy_backends/cuda/libs/nvrtc.pyx", line 125, in cupy_backends.cuda.libs.nvrtc.compileProgram

    check_status(status)
  File "cupy_backends/cuda/libs/nvrtc.pyx", line 53, in cupy_backends.cuda.libs.nvrtc.check_status
    raise NVRTCError(status)
cupy_backends.cuda.libs.nvrtc.NVRTCError: NVRTC_ERROR_COMPILATION (6)

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
  File "cupy/_core/core.pyx", line 1286, in cupy._core.core._ndarray_base.__mul__
    return _math._multiply(x, y)
  File "cupy/_core/_kernel.pyx", line 1375, in cupy._core._kernel.ufunc.__call__
    kern = self._get_ufunc_kernel(dev_id, op, arginfos, has_where)
  File "cupy/_core/_kernel.pyx", line 1402, in cupy._core._kernel.ufunc._get_ufunc_kernel
    kern = _get_ufunc_kernel(
  File "cupy/_core/_kernel.pyx", line 1082, in cupy._core._kernel._get_ufunc_kernel
    return _get_simple_elementwise_kernel(
  File "cupy/_core/_kernel.pyx", line 94, in cupy._core._kernel._get_simple_elementwise_kernel
    return _get_simple_elementwise_kernel_from_code(name, code, options)
  File "cupy/_core/_kernel.pyx", line 82, in cupy._core._kernel._get_simple_elementwise_kernel_from_code
    module = compile_with_cache(code, options)
  File "cupy/_core/core.pyx", line 2271, in cupy._core.core.compile_with_cache
    return cuda.compiler._compile_module_with_cache(
  File "/local/home/leof/dev/cupy_cuda125/cupy/cuda/compiler.py", line 486, in _compile_module_with_cache
    return _compile_with_cache_cuda(

  File "/local/home/leof/dev/cupy_cuda125/cupy/cuda/compiler.py", line 564, in _compile_with_cache_cuda
    ptx, mapping = compile_using_nvrtc(
                   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    return _compile(source, options, cu_path,

    compiled_obj, mapping = prog.compile(options, log_stream)
                            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/local/home/leof/dev/cupy_cuda125/cupy/cuda/compiler.py", line 698, in compile
    raise CompileException(log, self.src, self.name, options,
cupy.cuda.compiler.CompileException: /local/home/leof/dev/cupy_cuda125/cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h(129): catastrophic error: cannot open source file "vector_types.h"
  #include "vector_types.h"
                           ^

1 catastrophic error detected in the compilation of "/tmp/tmpa0mp8loa/14dde251ca1874a66662b9d9ad69ffce76ee1b6a.cubin.cu".
Compilation terminated.

```
The reason is that the fp16 headers now depend on the CUDA runtime headers (ex: `vector_types.h`):
```bash
$ grep -r cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12/ -e "#include"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12/cuda_fp16.h:#include "cuda_fp16.hpp"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <nv/target>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <utility>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <cstring>
$ grep -r cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/ -e "#include"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_types.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_functions.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.h:#include "cuda_fp16.hpp"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <nv/target>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <utility>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.2/cuda_fp16.hpp:#include <cstring>
$ grep -r cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/ -e "#include"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_types.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_functions.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include <nv/target>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include <utility>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include <cstring>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.3/cuda_fp16.h:#include "cuda_fp16.hpp"
$ grep -r cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/ -e "#include"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_types.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_functions.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include <nv/target>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include <utility>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include <cstring>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.4/cuda_fp16.h:#include "cuda_fp16.hpp"
$ grep -r cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/ -e "#include"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_types.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include "vector_functions.h"
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include <nv/target>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include <utility>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include <cstring>
cupy/_core/include/cupy/_cuda/cuda-12.5/cuda_fp16.h:#include "cuda_fp16.hpp"
```

Since needed headers are now redistributed on both PyPI and conda-forge, e.g.
```bash
$ unzip nvidia_cuda_runtime_cu12-12.6.37-py3-none-manylinux2014_x86_64.whl
```

We might consider just drop the bundled fp16 headers and use all needed CUDA headers from the wheel or conda package directly. For example, nvmath-python does this for its device API support (which also requires JIT compilation):
https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvmath-python/blob/7c485842d0f3300e03ec780056936503913910fe/nvmath/device/common_mathdx.py#L35-L90
This will also be answering in part the need of supporting CUDA wheels (#8013).","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8466/reactions","total_count":1,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":1},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8466/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":"completed"},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/comments/2372446054","html_url":"https://github.com/cupy/cupy/issues/8466#issuecomment-2372446054","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8466","id":2372446054,"node_id":"IC_kwDOBFKgkM6NaKdm","user":{"login":"Precola","id":46554831,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjQ2NTU0ODMx","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/46554831?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola","html_url":"https://github.com/Precola","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Precola/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-24T21:46:18Z","updated_at":"2024-09-24T21:46:18Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"> For the record, with CuPy's current design (that a local CTK is available) this is not a problem. It is just that there are increasing number of users trying to not install a full CTK, and those users might hit this issue.

I used a public server. I even don't know the installation path of cuda, After reading this page, I am still very confused that how can I fix this problem.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/comments/2372446054/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
